payload.title: refactor: create HospitalService as primary, deprecate TempleService
payload.body: TempleService still uses the old 'temples' naming. Create HospitalService as the primary service and add a backward-compatible alias. Depends on MySQL 'temples' table rename to 'hospitals'.

evidence: TempleService preserved for backward compat with 'temples' MySQL table
All controller callers still use TempleService — HospitalService ready for swap when DB renamed
unresolved: MySQL table rename on Hostinger needed before switching controllers to HospitalService
